rows.label: qev060506_MSG0032
rows.name:
While you go get the 3 Millennium Ice Ores
or the 10 Jakitos Coppers,
I will go look for employees![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0033
rows.name:
I think you said the Zaruboggan, right!
It's a little scary to talk to those mysterious masked people, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0034
rows.name:
I'll give it my best shot!
Because they just might turn out to be incredibly wonderful employees![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0084
rows.name:
Welcome back!
Did you get the 3 Millennium Ice Ores or the 10 Jakitos Coppers[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0086
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Ah, it seems you haven't obtained them yet.
Please hurry and get them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0087
rows.name: In the meantime, I'm going to scout these promising newcomers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0039
rows.name:
...Ah! Did you manage to get 3 Millennium Ice Ores
or 10 Jakitos Coppers?
If we at least have those...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0040
rows.name:
Ohh! It's super cold!
With just this, the overheated processing tank-chan
will definitely cool down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0041
rows.name:
Thank you!
...Ah, and there's another "thank you" I have for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0042
rows.name: You see, when I brought the Zaruboggan over to be employees just like you said, they completely cleaned up the contaminated air![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0043
rows.name:
That smoke that was spewing out so intensely
has completely returned to normal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0044
rows.name:
It's seriously amazing!
Arsenican-san and Trachlo-san!
These people are like magicians♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0045
rows.name:
Oh...?
You are the BLADE from before.
Were you acquainted with this person?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0046
rows.name:
Heheh, you allowed us to revoltant
some rather fine Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0047
rows.name:
My hunger has been satiated for the first time in a while.
This place is truly like land bestowed by Golbogga...
It's a place just like our home planet, Bedun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0048
rows.name:
Yeah! I have absolutely no idea what you're saying,
but it doesn't really matter, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_JNK0060
rows.name: Concur

rows.label: qev060506_SEL0061
rows.name:
Move the conversation forward,
saying the fine details don't matter.

rows.label: qev060506_JNK0070
rows.name: Teach

rows.label: qev060506_SEL0071
rows.name:
Thoroughly teach Liza
the Zaruboggan terminology.

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0049
rows.name:
I love how easygoing you are♪
If you think about the fine details too much,
your brain will just turn to mush![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0050
rows.name:
Uwaaaaaah...
Voltant belongs to Golbogga, and
Revoltant belongs to the Zaruboggan, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0051
rows.name:
Stop... please stop...
Don't corner me any further...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0052
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0053
rows.name:
...Alright!
I've given up on trying to understand the specialized terminology around here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0054
rows.name:
Anyway, thank you!
Of course I have a reward for you...
...And also![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0055
rows.name:
I'm Dazbeno, the technical advisor for this plant!
Please let me give you a gift of gratitude as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0056
rows.name:
Man, even fully utilizing Ma-non technology,
we couldn't have cleaned this up, you know?
Those Zaruboggan are amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0057
rows.name:
...See!
You and the Zaruboggan are the heroes who saved NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060506_MSG0058
rows.name: Heheh, and I'm glad I didn't get scolded by anyone either♪[ST:wait ]
